ddls:
CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor affecting consumer shopping experience */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of the factor (e.g., Financial, Quality, Service) */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the factor */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score indicating consumer sentiment toward the factor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the factor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the attribute */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor it belongs to */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., Price, Authenticity, Service) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute affecting consumer behavior */,
  "attribute_weight" REAL /* Weight of the attribute in the overall score calculation */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score for the attribute's impact */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation indicating variability in the responses */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the attribute was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute being commented on */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the consumer providing feedback */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the market where the feedback was collected */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the demographic segment of the consumer */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "feedback_score" REAL /* Score given by the consumer for the attribute */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Text comments provided by the consumer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the market was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic segment */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic segment */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the demographic segment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)
